first_look.name: First Look
first_look.summary: Use this oracle to establish the first impression of a character you encounter.

revealed_details.name: Revealed Details
revealed_details.summary: Use this oracle to reveal additional character traits and details as you get to know someone better.

firstborn.name: Firstborn Names
firstborn.summary: Use these names for elves, giants, varou, and trolls.

battleground.name: Battleground
battleground.summary: Roll on this oracle to reveal a feature of the combat environment that affects the fight. Use the result to inspire tactical choices or complicate the situation.

rows.text2: Mud, ice, rain-slick rocks
Water, muck, deep snow, webs
Cliff, ravine, pit, stairs
Barricade, toppled ruin, fallen tree
Mound, outcropping, climbable structure
Rubble, rocks, roots
Darkness, smoke, mist, torrential rain
Deep waterway, high wall, cliff face, locked door
Low walls, boulders, trees, crates
Narrow tunnel, crowded room, dense woods
Fire pit, boiling hot spring, quagmire
Bridge, corridor, river ford, narrow canyon
Crumbling ruins, thin ice, undermined earth
Dueling circle, woodland clearing, standing stones
Steep hillside, rooftop, collapsed ruin, ship deck
Trap, sinkhole, lurking creature, waiting ambushers
Noncombatants, panicked creatures, insect swarms
Storm, fire, flooding, rampaging creature
Mystic energies, runic symbols, sorcerous artifacts
Corpses, shambling undead, ghostly specters

tactic.name: Tactic
tactic.summary: Use this oracle to help inspire an action for an NPC in combat. When you're not sure what your foe does next, particularly when they have initiative, roll on this table and interpret the result as appropriate to the situation.

rows.text: Use the terrain to gain advantage.

descriptor.name: Descriptor
descriptor.summary: Use the Descriptor oracle to add texture to the details of a location or event. Combined with a Focus oracle result, it provides a more specific prompt than either oracle alone.

focus.name: Focus
focus.summary: Use the Focus oracle to add detail or subject matter to a location or event. Combined with a Descriptor oracle result, it provides a more specific prompt than either oracle alone.

building_prompt.name: Building a Prompt
building_prompt.summary: Use this table to choose a structured prompt when you are unsure which Core oracles to combine for a question.

landmark.name: Landmark
landmark.summary: Use this oracle to help envision a basic feature of the landscape as a journey waypoint or key location.

waypoint.name: Waypoint
waypoint.summary: Use this oracle to reveal a location, discovery, or event when you Undertake a Journey and reach a waypoint.

rows.text: A camp or settlement comes into view
A long-dead corpse or skeleton lies here
A herd of wildlife cuts across your path
A wide river winds across the landscape
Flies swarm around an enormous pile of scat
A stone wall marks an old boundary line
A cold fire pit hints at the passage of another traveler
An unsettling silence falls over this area
You discover the remnants of a ritual
A crude wall or barricade marks a makeshift fortification
You cross paths with a lone traveler
Ash surrounds a long-cold funeral pyre
A creature stands in defense of its nest or young

A stone-framed doorway marks the entrance to a barrow mound
Tracks show that others have passed this way
You catch a gleam of metal in the distance
A waterway cuts through the landscape
A ford or ferry marks a river crossing
You encounter a procession of refugees or nomads
A grim marker denotes a territorial boundary
You hear the footfalls or stirrings of a large creature
Something about this place evokes an unnerving sensation
An abandoned or lifeless settlement lingers in silence
A storm brews on the horizon
A lake, pond, or pool reflects its surroundings

A rope bridge sways in the wind
A broken bridge marks a now-unused crossing
A series of ramshackle bridges connect high places
Phantom voices or song carry on the wind
A constructed bridge spans a river or gap
Something about this place spurs a memory
You encounter a small group of travelers
You discover the aftermath of a fight or battle
A recent landslide, collapse, or rockfall scars the landscape
Just ahead, a column of smoke rises into the sky
A cave opening is carved into the side of a hill or cliff

An overlook offers an expansive view of the landscape ahead
Abandoned construction is all that remains of a failed project
A great tree or rocky spire stands tall above its surroundings
Carrion birds circle overhead—a bad omen
You spot the banners of an armed force on the move
Mist rises from a plunging waterfall
You find disturbing remains or evidence of a violent death
A natural bridge spans a river or gap
Mystic stones or strange pillars stand here
The landscape is strewn with a maze of rocky spires
Fallen trees or upturned earth mark a destructive path
Cleared, cultivated, or barren ground stands apart from its surroundings
The nature of the landscape or environment changes
Scorched ground marks the location of a recent fire
Stones or markings form a mystic circle
Creatures gather at a source of water
The path ascends a hill or ridgeline
Carved symbols or likenesses adorn the landscape
A great flying creature circles overhead
A road or trail marks a well-used path
The weather shifts, a portent of things to come
The skeleton of a massive animal or beast lies here
A large stone bears an inscription or message
A ragged banner hangs from a leaning pole
A makeshift shelter or solitary home lies abandoned
A large creature hunts or forages here, but pays you no heed
Carrion animals pick at scattered remains
You hear the sounds of a nearby battle
You hear the calls of unusual wildlife
Natural or carved steps lead up a slope or cliffside
An altar, shrine, or memorial marks a hallowed place
The landscape is divided by a ravine or fissure
A natural oasis stands amid an otherwise ruined or barren landscape
A dry riverbed or trench cuts through the landscape like a scar
Nature is stunted or diseased in this place
An ancient monument or statue stands here
A shadowy path leads along a narrow canyon or pass
Tracks or claw marks reveal the passage of a large animal or beast
A caravan is camped here or passing through
A signal station, lookout, or tower sits on high ground
Scattered stones mark a toppled structure or monument
A lingering fog clings to the terrain
You top a rise, and catch sight of a trailing person or creature
Intricately stacked cairn stones mark a lonely gravesite or remembrance
A promontory or summit rises above the landscape
A wagon or cart sits abandoned
A crudely-fashioned effigy watches over the surroundings
A sinkhole or pit leads to unseen depths
An unusual tree or rock formation stands apart from its surroundings
The path descends into a valley or basin
The ground is scattered with broken bones
The plants here are strangely at odds with their environment
Blood-spattered ground or a bloody trail mark a violent end

peril.name: Peril
peril.summary: Use this oracle to reveal the nature of a perilous event or complication on a journey.

rows.text: Lingering foul weather tests your endurance
A piece of important gear is damaged or broken
Provisions are lost, wasted, or spoiled
The weather takes a turn for the worse
Rugged terrain or dense vegetation hampers your progress
An injury or old pain causes trouble
A cleverly camouflaged or hidden predator attacks
You stumble into the lair or nest of dangerous creatures
You are caught in a trap or ambush
An impassable path forces a dangerous detour
The path forces a treacherous crossing over a river or gap
A steep cliff or precipitous drop stands in your way
Confounding paths cause you to lose your way
You realize something important was lost or left behind
You come upon a settlement or camp in crisis
Someone who watches over this area makes a costly demand or threat
An enemy patrol or outpost guards this area
You encounter a dangerous animal or pack
Insects or small creatures swarm to attack
You are caught in a flood or forced to navigate a perilous waterway
You encounter a fellow traveler in peril
Fog or darkness hides a lurking danger
You suffer the effects of toxic plants or venomous creatures
You are caught within unnatural mist or darkness
A companion or fellow traveler stumbles into danger

A deceptively peaceful location lures you into a false sense of safety
Spooked creatures stampede along your path
A companion or fellow traveler is injured or falls ill
You face a dreadful vision or hallucination
A sinkhole or pit opens beneath you
A supernatural entity seeks vengeance or absolution
Unstable terrain causes a rockfall or landslide
Your presence triggers a spell or supernatural anomaly

opportunity.name: Opportunity
opportunity.summary: Use this oracle to reveal the nature of an unexpected and beneficial event on a journey.

You find an ideal location for a campsite
An awe-inspiring vista offers comfort or inspiration
A helpful traveler crosses your path
An intriguing site offers opportunities for exploration
A vantage point reveals a key landmark
A nearby settlement flies a friendly banner
Something about this journey sparks a fond or helpful memory
You encounter a helpful or useful animal
You encounter a friendly group of local denizens
A sheltered refuge offers a place to hide, plan, or recover
A monument or relic reveals something of the history of this land
You find plants or herbs with potentially helpful qualities
Tracks or a cooling campfire show that others have passed this way
You are forewarned of a dangerous path
A desolate settlement or camp offers scavenging opportunities
You find an opening to distract, escape, or avoid foes
A clue offers insight into a current quest or mystery
You encounter a potential benefactor in need of help
You learn or improve a useful skill
A caravan offers the potential comforts and safety of a community
You experience a helpful dream or vision
The terrain offers a defensible position against a threat
A supernatural entity offers helpful guidance
You encounter a majestic or previously unknown creature
A lurking foe unwittingly reveals themselves, giving you the drop on them
You spot a friendly animal keeping pace with you—a good omen
A signpost or marker provides guidance
An otherwise dangerous predator shows benign interest in you
A stone or tree bears helpful or inspiring markings from past travelers
You experience a moment of fellowship or inner peace
You find an object or resource of great value

landmark.name: Landmark
landmark.summary: Use this oracle to help envision a basic feature of the coastal waters as a journey waypoint or key location.

waypoint.name: Waypoint
waypoint.summary: Use this oracle to reveal a location, discovery, or event when you Undertake a Journey and reach a waypoint.

ritual_backlash.name: Ritual Backlash
ritual_backlash.summary: Those who deal in magic may find themselves at the mercy of chaos. This oracle can supplement, or replace, the Pay the Price table when resolving the outcome of a failed ritual or other negative interaction with mystical forces. Use this oracle in dramatic moments, or to introduce an unexpected outcome triggered by a match.

rows.text: Your ritual has the opposite effect.
Your friend, ally, or companion is adversely affected.
You inadvertently summon a spirit or undead being.
You collapse, and drift into a troubled sleep.
You undergo a physical torment which leaves its mark upon you.
You hear ghostly voices whispering of dark portents.
You find yourself in another place without memory of how you got there.
You alert someone or something to your presence.
You are not yourself, and act against a friend, ally, or companion.
You affect your surroundings, causing a disturbance or potential harm.
You suffer the loss of a sense for several hours.
You lose your connection to magic for a day or so.
Your ritual affects the target in an unexpected and problematic way.
Your ritual reveals a surprising and troubling truth.
You are tempted by dark powers.
You see a troubling vision of your future.
You can't perform this ritual again until you acquire a key component.
You develop a strange fear or compulsion.
Your ritual causes creatures to exhibit strange or aggressive behavior.
You are tormented by an apparition from your past.
You are wracked with sudden sickness.
Roll twice; if they are the same result, make it worse.

mystic_effect.name: Mystic Effect
mystic_effect.summary: Use this oracle to reveal the nature or outcome of a mystic power, ritual effect, or supernatural phenomenon.

rows.text: Bind to a vow or task.
Grant a lasting boon—at a cost.

scale.name: Scale Oracles
scale.summary: Use these oracles to help answer a question related to the scale, extent, or capability of something.

rank.name: Rank
rank.summary: Use this oracle to randomly set the challenge rank of a quest, journey, or foe.

rows.text2: A challenging quest with a small number of obstacles
rows.text3:
Journey: Traveling a moderate distance within a single region

Foe: Common enemies

rows.text2: An involved quest with several obstacles
rows.text3:
Journey: Traveling a long distance within a single region, or across rough terrain

Foe: Capable fighters and deadly creatures

rows.text2: A complex quest with many obstacles
rows.text3:
Journey: Traveling from one region to another, or across especially challenging terrain

Foe: Exceptional fighters and mighty creatures

rows.text2: An intimidating quest with scores of obstacles
rows.text3:
Journey: Traveling through multiple regions

Foe: Foes of overwhelming skill or power

rows.text2: A life-defining quest of unknowable scope
rows.text3:
Journey: Traveling from one end of the Ironlands to another, or to a separate land

Foe: Legendary foes of mythic power

magnitude.name: Magnitude
magnitude.summary: Ask your question, choose one of the following tables, and roll to reveal the answer.

rows.text: Built on a hill or crag
In the shadow of a terrain feature
Ringed by a moat or ditch
Scars of an attack or disaster
Visited by large caravan or fleet
Old siege weapons left to rot

quick_name.name: Quick Settlement Name Generator
quick_name.summary: Roll once for the prefix and once for the suffix, taking your pick of choices in that row.

type.name: Type
type.summary: When using this oracle to reveal the scale and purpose of a settlement, choose whether the community is located in settled lands, boundary lands, or remote lands.

clue.name: Clue
clue.summary: When you investigate a mystery, you might uncover clues in the form of messages, rumors, eyewitness reports, supernatural revelations, or physical evidence. Use this oracle to help reveal what this evidence connects to or implicates.

rows.text: Affirms a previously understood fact or clue
Connects to a known rumor or scandal
Connects to a previously unrelated mystery or quest
Connects to your own expertise or interests
Contradicts a previously understood fact or clue
Involves a hidden or mysterious community
Involves a hidden or mysterious person
Involves a nonhuman being or entity
Involves an artifact or precious object
Involves a notable community or faction
Involves a leader or notable person
Involves a person or community from your background
Involves a mystic power or ritual
Leads to a nearby or familiar place
Leads to an ancient or ruined place
Leads to a remote or wild place
Leads to a mystical or unearthly place
Suggests a history of similar incidents
Suggests a looming event or deadline

plot_twist.name: Major Plot Twist
plot_twist.summary: Use this oracle to introduce a narrative surprise or revelation. Most of these results have a negative implication, and can be used to resolve a match at a crucial moment in your story. In particular, this is an effective tool to leverage when you make a move with matched 10's on the challenge dice.

rows.text: An assumption is revealed to be false
A more dangerous foe is revealed
You and an enemy share a common goal
You are betrayed by someone who was trusted
The truth of a relationship is revealed
Two seemingly unrelated situations are shown to be connected
Unexpected powers or abilities are revealed
Roll twice; if they are the same result, make it worse

journey.name: Journey Moves
journey.summary: Journey moves are used as you travel across the Ironlands.

follow_a_path.name: Follow a Path

trigger.text: When you journey along a known route, and one day blends into the next...

follow_a_path.text:
When __you journey along a known route, and one day blends into the next__, roll +supply.

On a __strong hit__, you reach your destination and the situation favors you. Take +1 momentum.

On a __weak hit__, you complete the journey, but face a cost or complication. Choose one or more.

  * You took longer than expected.
  * You pressed on through pain, sickness, or weariness: [Endure Harm](datasworn:move:classic/suffer/endure_harm).
  * You suffered under the burden of foul weather, worries, or fearful locations: [Endure Stress](datasworn:move:classic/suffer/endure_stress).
  * You wasted resources.
  * You face a complication or hazard at the destination. Envision what you find ([Ask the Oracle](datasworn:move:classic/fate/ask_the_oracle) if unsure).

On a __miss__, you are waylaid by a dire threat and must [Pay the Price](datasworn:move:classic/fate/pay_the_price). If you overcome this obstacle, you may push on safely to your destination.

strong_hit.text: On a __strong hit__, you reach your destination and the situation favors you. Take +1 momentum.

weak_hit.text:
On a __weak hit__, you complete the journey, but face a cost or complication. Choose one or more.

  * You took longer than expected.
  * You pressed on through pain, sickness, or weariness: [Endure Harm](datasworn:move:classic/suffer/endure_harm).
  * You suffered under the burden of foul weather, worries, or fearful locations: [Endure Stress](datasworn:move:classic/suffer/endure_stress).
  * You wasted resources.
  * You face a complication or hazard at the destination. Envision what you find ([Ask the Oracle](datasworn:move:classic/fate/ask_the_oracle) if unsure).

miss.text: On a __miss__, you are waylaid by a dire threat and must [Pay the Price](datasworn:move:classic/fate/pay_the_price). If you overcome this obstacle, you may push on safely to your destination.

face_danger.name: Face Danger

conditions.text: With aggressive action, forceful defense, strength, or endurance

trigger.text: When you attempt something risky or react to an imminent threat...

face_danger.text:
When __you attempt something risky or react to an imminent threat__, envision your action and roll. If you act...

  * With speed, agility, or precision: Roll +edge.
  * With charm, loyalty, or courage: Roll +heart.
  * With aggressive action, forceful defense, strength, or endurance: Roll +iron.
  * With deception, stealth, or trickery: Roll +shadow.
  * With expertise, insight, or observation: Roll +wits.

On a __strong hit__, you are successful. Take +1 momentum.

On a __weak hit__, you succeed, but face a troublesome cost. Choose one.

  * You are delayed, lose advantage, or face a new danger: Suffer -1 momentum.
  * You are tired or hurt: [Endure Harm](datasworn:move:classic/suffer/endure_harm) (1 harm).
  * You are dispirited or afraid: [Endure Stress](datasworn:move:classic/suffer/endure_stress) (1 stress).
  * You sacrifice resources: Suffer -1 supply.

On a __miss__, you fail, or a momentary success is undermined by a dire turn of events. [Pay the Price](datasworn:move:classic/fate/pay_the_price).

strong_hit.text: On a __strong hit__, you are successful. Take +1 momentum.

weak_hit.text:
On a __weak hit__, you succeed, but face a troublesome cost. Choose one.

  * You are delayed, lose advantage, or face a new danger: Suffer -1 momentum.
  * You are tired or hurt: [Endure Harm](datasworn:move:classic/suffer/endure_harm) (1 harm).
  * You are dispirited or afraid: [Endure Stress](datasworn:move:classic/suffer/endure_stress) (1 stress).
  * You sacrifice resources: Suffer -1 supply.

miss.text: On a __miss__, you fail, or a momentary success is undermined by a dire turn of events. [Pay the Price](datasworn:move:classic/fate/pay_the_price).

scene_challenge.name: Scene Challenge Moves
scene_challenge.summary: A scene challenge is an optional approach you can use to resolve an extended challenge against an obstacle or NPCs.

begin_the_scene.name: Begin the Scene

trigger.text: When you face an extended or complex challenge...

begin_the_scene.text:
When __you face an extended or complex challenge__, name your objective and choose a rank as appropriate to the situation.

  * You have a clear advantage: Troublesome
  * You are ready to act: Dangerous
  * You are unprepared or outmatched: Formidable

Then, activate a four-segment countdown track and [Face Danger](datasworn:move:lodestar/scene_challenge/face_danger) or [Secure an Advantage](datasworn:move:lodestar/scene_challenge/secure_an_advantage) to take action.

face_danger.name: Face Danger (Scene Challenge)

conditions.text: With aggressive action, forceful defense, strength, or endurance

trigger.text: When you attempt something risky or react to an imminent threat within a scene challenge...

face_danger.text:
When __you attempt something risky or react to an imminent threat within a scene challenge__, envision your action and roll. If you act...

  * With speed, agility, or precision: Roll +edge.
  * With charm, loyalty, or courage: Roll +heart.
  * With aggressive action, forceful defense, strength, or endurance: Roll +iron.
  * With deception, stealth, or trickery: Roll +shadow.
  * With expertise, insight, or observation: Roll +wits.

On a __strong hit__, you are successful and mark progress. On a __strong hit with a match__, mark progress twice.

On a __weak hit__, you are successful and mark progress, but also encounter a complication or setback. Envision what occurs and mark a countdown segment.

On a __miss__, you fail, or a momentary success is undermined by a dramatic turn of events. Mark a countdown segment and [Pay the Price](datasworn:move:classic/fate/pay_the_price). On a __miss with a match__, mark two segments and [Pay the Price](datasworn:move:classic/fate/pay_the_price).

strong_hit.text: On a __strong hit__, you are successful and mark progress. On a __strong hit with a match__, mark progress twice.

weak_hit.text: On a __weak hit__, you are successful and mark progress, but also encounter a complication or setback. Envision what occurs and mark a countdown segment.

miss.text: On a __miss__, you fail, or a momentary success is undermined by a dramatic turn of events. Mark a countdown segment and [Pay the Price](datasworn:move:classic/fate/pay_the_price). On a __miss with a match__, mark two segments and [Pay the Price](datasworn:move:classic/fate/pay_the_price).

secure_an_advantage.name: Secure an Advantage (Scene Challenge)

conditions.text: With aggressive action, forceful defense, strength, or endurance

trigger.text: When you assess a situation, make preparations, or attempt to gain leverage within a scene challenge...

secure_an_advantage.text:
When __you assess a situation, make preparations, or attempt to gain leverage__, envision your action and roll. If you act...

  * With speed, agility, or precision: Roll +edge.
  * With charm, loyalty, or courage: Roll +heart.
  * With aggressive action, forceful defense, strength, or endurance: Roll +iron.
  * With deception, stealth, or trickery: Roll +shadow.
  * With expertise, insight, or observation: Roll +wits.

On a __strong hit__, take both. On a __strong hit with a match__, take both and mark progress. On a __weak hit__, choose one.

  * Take +2 momentum
  * Add +1 on your next move (not a progress move)

On a __miss__, you fail or your assumptions betray you. Mark a countdown segment and [Pay the Price](datasworn:move:classic/fate/pay_the_price). On a __miss with a match__, mark two segments and [Pay the Price](datasworn:move:classic/fate/pay_the_price).

strong_hit.text:
On a __strong hit__, take +2 momentum and add +1 on your next move (not a progress move).

On a __strong hit with a match__, take +2 momentum, add +1 on your next move (not a progress move), and mark progress.

weak_hit.text:
On a __weak hit__, choose one.

  * Take +2 momentum
  * Add +1 on your next move (not a progress move)

miss.text: On a __miss__, you fail or your assumptions betray you. Mark a countdown segment and [Pay the Price](datasworn:move:classic/fate/pay_the_price). On a __miss with a match__, mark two segments and [Pay the Price](datasworn:move:classic/fate/pay_the_price).

finish_the_scene.name: Finish the Scene

trigger.text: When the scene challenge countdown track or progress track is filled, or when events lead to the scene’s conclusion...

finish_the_scene.text:
When __the scene challenge tension clock or progress track is filled, or when events lead to the scene’s conclusion__, roll the challenge dice and compare to your progress.

On a __strong hit__, you achieve your objective unconditionally.

On a __weak hit__, you succeed, but not without cost. You must [Pay the Price](datasworn:move:classic/fate/pay_the_price). Make this a minor cost relative to the scope of the scene.

On a __miss__, you fail or are undermined by a dire turn of events. [Pay the Price](datasworn:move:classic/fate/pay_the_price).

strong_hit.text: On a __strong hit__, you achieve your objective unconditionally.

weak_hit.text: On a __weak hit__, you succeed, but not without cost. You must [Pay the Price](datasworn:move:classic/fate/pay_the_price). Make this a minor cost relative to the scope of the scene.

miss.text: On a __miss__, you fail or are undermined by a dire turn of events. [Pay the Price](datasworn:move:classic/fate/pay_the_price).
